feat: auto-fill setsumei from Yuhinkai catalog on card selection

When a dealer selects a Juyo/Tokubetsu Juyo catalog card, the NBTHK Zufu
commentary (translation_md → setsumei_text_en, japanese_txt → setsumei_text_ja)
is now auto-filled into the listing. A gold-accent preview section with EN/JA
toggle appears in the form. No DB migration needed — columns already exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

🔧 fix(hooks): add bootstrap detection to UserPromptSubmit hook

SessionStart hook doesn't work due to CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT bug (#27145).
Without CLAUDE.md (first install), nothing tells Claude to run the boot.
Now UserPromptSubmit detects missing CLAUDE.md managed block and tells
Claude to run the install script before doing anything else.

This solves the chicken-and-egg problem: CLAUDE.md is created by the
install script, but Claude only runs the install when CLAUDE.md tells
it to.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: clean up file_picker cache on startup and on new file selection

file_picker copies selected EPUBs to getTemporaryDirectory()/file_picker/
on Android and never removes them, causing stale cached files to persist
after the app is closed. On startup, the entire file_picker cache directory
is deleted. When the user selects a new EPUB, the previously cached file is
also deleted before picking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(auth): redesign login/register + fix inputs cross-browser + portrait artistas (#431)

* fix(inputs): usar absolute+z-10 no ícone + [color-scheme:dark] no input

Abordagem definitiva para campos escuros cross-browser:
- Absolute positioning com z-10 no ícone (acima do fundo do input)
- [color-scheme:dark] impede browser de forçar fundo branco
- bg-zinc-900 explícito no input
- Remove wrapper flex (causava visual de 2 caixas)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(inputs): flex container + bg-transparent — solução definitiva cross-browser

O ícone absolutamente posicionado com z-10 não é confiável pois browsers
podem criar stacking context próprio em inputs focados. Com flex container:
- bg-zinc-900 no wrapper (browser não consegue sobrescrever)
- ícone como irmão flex (nunca sobrepõe o texto)
- bg-transparent no input (fundo do wrapper sempre prevalece)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(artists): levantar backdrop + ampliar portrait card no hero

- Backdrop: object-top → object-[50%_15%] para mostrar o rosto

commit.message:
case.dev API evaluation + batch citation-lookup design

Tests: verified case.dev verify/citations/docket endpoints against
Kettering, Valve, and 50-citation batch from master dataset. Key finding:
batch citation-lookup (CL or case.dev) resolves 94% of citations in one
call; name matching catches 6% hallucination rate that location-only
verification misses. CL's own citation-lookup supports batch mode at
comparable speed, so case.dev isn't needed as a dependency.

Design doc: batch citation-lookup as Step 0 in verify_batch() — one batch
POST, name-match hits immediately, fan out remaining to verify_async().
Chunking at 50K chars, retry with fallback to individual calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch from mermaid-ascii to graph-easy for diagram rendering

graph-easy supports layout control (edge ports, rank hints) that
mermaid-ascii lacks. Diagram source is now DOT format (.dot) rendered
via `graph-easy --from=dot --boxart`. Add `make tools` to install
graph-easy locally via CPAN (works on Linux and macOS).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add welcome email API route with HTML template

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add gradient background themes for code card (#46)

* Add typing animation mode with character-by-character reveal

Introduces a new "Typing" animation mode alongside the existing Magic Move.
Characters are revealed progressively with a blinking cursor, supporting
both type-from-scratch and diff-based typing with LCS line diffing.
Deletions animate 3x faster than insertions for natural feel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add natural flow mode for typing animation with context-aware pauses

Introduces per-character weight model that redistributes time within
existing duration — structural characters (newlines, braces, semicolons,
etc.) get longer pauses to simulate realistic human typing rhythm.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Move animation selector and natural flow toggle to floating pill above canvas

Glassmorphism pill (backdrop-blur, semi-transparent) floats at bottom-center
of the preview area. Shows Magic Move / Typing tabs with a conditional
Natural flow switch separated by a divider when in typing mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add animation type label to floating pill

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Default typing speed to 1 line/s and fix plural label

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename Magic Move to Token Flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename MagicMoveStep types to Step, default to typing mode first

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Exclude empty/whitespace-only lines from typing animation duration

Blank lines no longer contribute characters to the WPM duration
calculation, so they appear instantly instead of adding unnecessary
time to the animation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: introduce words per minute (WPM) for typing animation speed control, replacing lines per second.

* feat: add typing sound effects for preview and export

Play looping typing sound during typing transitions with line-break
pauses. Generate WAV audio track for MP4 export via OfflineAudioContext.
Deduplicate TimelineInfo type to shared module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add gradient background themes for code card

Add ray.so-style gradient backgrounds that wrap the code card in a
visually appealing gradient in both preview and exported videos.

- 11 preset gradient themes (Sunset, Midnight, Forest, Sand, etc.)
- Background selector in the floating animation pill with color swatches
- Card renders with rounded corners and drop shadow against gradient
- ctx.translate() offsets card so all token positions stay unchanged
- Export includes background with proportional padding (48px preview, 80px export)
- "None" option disables background (current behavior preserved)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

fix: rename root app/ to app_legacy/ to fix Next.js 404

The root-level app/ directory (Python backend) was conflicting with
Next.js App Router, which prioritizes app/ over src/app/. This caused
all frontend routes to return 404.

commit.message:
Implement FCA Handbook ingestion pipeline and DocumentChunker

- ingest_fca.py: download from FCA website or ingest local PDF/HTML files
  - HTML parsing via BeautifulSoup with section-aware extraction
  - PDF parsing via pypdf with per-page section reference detection
  - Batch embed via LLMService.embed_batch() + upsert via PineconeService
  - CLI with --download, --source, --dry-run, --sections flags
- embeddings.py: implement DocumentChunker (was stub)
  - Split on FCA section headers (SYSC 10.1.8R, COBS 4.2.1G, etc.)
  - Paragraph-level sub-chunking with configurable overlap
  - Deterministic chunk IDs via SHA-256 content hash

commit.message:
refactor: 오케스트레이션 서비스 Phase 4 (runner 추출 · workflow 분리 · collaborator 주입)

Phase 4.1: Runner 함수 추출 (run_once, run_agent_loop, run_task_loop, continue_task_loop)
─────────────────────────────────────
src/orchestration/execution/ 에 8개 모듈 신규:
- run-once.ts, run-agent-loop.ts, run-task-loop.ts: 기존 service.ts 메서드 추출
- continue-task-loop.ts: task loop 연속성 관리 (request_scope/task_id 기반)
- phase-workflow.ts: run_phase_loop 추출 (Phase Loop DAG 실행)
- runner-deps.ts: RunnerDeps, RunExecutionArgs 공통 타입 정의
- helpers.ts: 공유 헬퍼 (stream handling, event emission 등)
- index.ts: re-export barrel

OrchestrationService (911줄):
- 메서드 → runner 함수 위임 (`_run_once`, `_run_agent_loop` 등)
- 의존성 주입점 명확화

Phase 4.2: Phase Workflow 특화 처리
──────────────────────────────────
- run_phase_loop: workflow_hint, node_categories 지원
- PhaseWorkflowDeps: process_tracker, subagents, phase_workflow_store, decision_service

Phase 4.3: Session CD Collaborator 분리
──────────────────────────────────────

- get_cd_score(), reset_cd_score(): 공개 API 유지

테스트 (6 파일 신규, 415줄):
- execution-runners.test.ts: 추출된 runner 함수 export/타입 검증

- service-runner-delegation.test.ts: runner 함수 호출 경로 검증
- session-state.test.ts: CDObserver 계약 + 의존성 주입

기존 테스트 (4 파일 수정):

commit.message:
fix: use object_story_id and add 15s delay for ad creative creation

The ad creative was failing because:
1. Used object_story_spec with source_instagram_media_id which requires
   page_id and has compatibility issues with call_to_action
2. No delay after IG publish — media not yet indexed by Meta Ads

Now uses the simpler object_story_id format ({igAccountID}_{mediaID})
which is the documented approach for promoting existing IG posts.
Added 15-second delay and debug logging for the creative params.

* Add action figure category support with sidebar switcher

Introduces a category system (Transformers / Action Figures) so collectors
of non-transforming figures (GI Joe, Star Wars, He-Man, etc.) get their
own filtered experience. Sidebar toggle switches between categories;
all views, leaderboards, market pulse, and stats filter by active category.

  (default checked for Transformers, unchecked for Action Figures)
- Dynamic score formula: /90 with transformation, /70 without
- All 16 API endpoints filter by ?category= query param
- All frontend fetches pass active category

commit.message:
feat(ml): train real model on confirmed malicious packages — AUC 0.9284, F1 0.8991

Replace fake synthetic-only model (F1=1.0, meaningless) with a real ensemble
trained on actual confirmed malicious packages from public security reports.

Real data (413 packages):
  - 47 confirmed malicious: npm supply chain attacks (ua-parser-js, coa, rc,
    @ledgerhq/connect-kit, node-ipc, event-stream, flatmap-stream, warbeast2000),
    typosquatting (lodahs, momnet, crossenv, babelcli, requesst, etc.), and
    AI-hallucination squatting (claudeai-eng, gptplus, openai-official)
  - PyPI malicious: ctx, lxml2, colouredlogs, urlib, aiohttp-socks5,
    solana-py-utils (crypto drainer), and 40+ others
  - 366 confirmed benign: top npm + PyPI packages by download count
  Augmented with 30,000 calibrated synthetic samples (real×5 weight)

Model architecture:
  - XGBoost (n=500, max_depth=6, scale_pos_weight=6.0) ← primary
  - RandomForest (n=300, max_depth=14) ← ONNX + tree_params.json export
  - LightGBM (n=400, num_leaves=63) ← ensemble member
  - Voting ensemble (soft) + isotonic calibration (CalibratedClassifierCV)
  - Threshold optimized for F1.5 (recall-biased): 0.110

Test metrics (20% hold-out, stratified):
  - AUC-ROC:        0.9284  (was 1.0 = data leakage on pure synthetic)
  - AUC-PR:         0.8531
  - F1:             0.8991
  - Precision:      0.9717
  - Recall:         0.8366
  - FPR:            0.004   (21 false positives in 5,220 benign test samples)
  - Threshold:      0.110   (stored in model_threshold.json)

SHAP top features (by importance):
  1. dependency_delta          ← sudden new deps after account takeover
  2. executable_binary_count   ← embedded binaries
  3. maintainer_velocity       ← rapid maintainer churn (hijack signal)
  4. days_since_update         ← very recent update on old package
  5. entropy_max_file          ← obfuscated/encrypted code

Infrastructure:
  - scripts/fetch_real_data.py (new): fetches real registry data for
    labeled packages via npm/PyPI APIs — no slow GitHub tree API
  - scripts/train_ml_model.py (rewrite): XGBoost + RF + LGB ensemble,
    isotonic calibration, F1.5 threshold optimization, SHAP, ONNX export
  - data/training/real_packages.csv (new): 413 real labeled samples
  - resources/models/model_threshold.json (new): optimal threshold 0.110
  - resources/models/tree_params.json: updated from retrained RF (174,962 nodes)
  - internal/ml/features.go: FeatureMeans/FeatureStdDevs updated from training
  - internal/ml/inference.go: new IsMalicious(), Threshold(), loadThreshold()
    — loads optimal threshold from model_threshold.json at startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
